display_information.name: SipChecker
display_information.description: Hydration monitors for #world-random to verify and track hydration habits (https://42born2code.slack.com/docs/T039P7U66/F09QAMF1CJG)
display_information.long_description: Your friendly hydration stalker. Your every sip is logged, analyzed, and judged. Forget privacy. Did you drink water today? We're watching. We're always watching. Join the hydration cult! Warning: May cause existential dread about your water intake.

slash_commands.description: Check sip information for a user
Display global hydration statistics for all users
